'''Zorug Briefly''' was a correspondent sent to [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] in order to broadcast [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] supposed [[Death/Legends|death]] after his [[Palleus Chuff|decoy's]] ship was destroyed by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]].

{{Char-stub}}
